name: Castle Minerals Limited
summary: Castle Minerals Limited, a gold exploration company, engages in the exploration of gold and other economic mineral deposits in West Africa and Australia. The company holds 100% interest in Wanganui and Polelle gold projects located in the Meekatharra gold mining district of Western Australia. It also holds an 80% interests in the Beasley Creek projects located in the Pilbara region of Western Australia. In addition, the company holds Wa project located in Ghana. Castle Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
